creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
Radim, can you update to 5.5.17_1 port and check if the problem persists
for you?

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

A computer programmer is a device for turning requirements
into undocumented features. It runs on cola, pizza and Dilbert cartoons.
  -- Bram Moolenaar
